recommendations.title: It's Such a Beautiful Day
recommendations.overview: Dark and troubling events force Bill to reckon with the meaning of his life.

recommendations.title: It's Such a Beautiful Day
recommendations.overview: Bill struggles to put together his shattered psyche.

recommendations.title: World of Tomorrow
recommendations.overview: A little girl is taken on a mind-bending tour of her distant future.

recommendations.title: Rejected
recommendations.overview: A hilarious collection of animated television commercials that were rejected because of their creator's failing grip on sanity.

recommendations.title: Klaus
recommendations.overview: A selfish postman and a reclusive toymaker form an unlikely friendship, delivering joy to a cold, dark town that desperately needs it.

recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: Memoir of a Snail
recommendations.overview: Forcibly separated from her twin brother when they are orphaned, a melancholic misfit learns how to find confidence within herself amid the clutter of misfortunes and everyday life.

recommendations.title: Robot Dreams
recommendations.overview: A lonely dog's friendship with his robot companion takes a sad turn when an unexpected malfunction forces him to abandon Robot at the beach. Will Dog ever meet Robot again?

recommendations.title: A Single Man

recommendations.title: Women on the Verge of a Nervous Breakdown
recommendations.overview: After being dumped by her lover, Pepa finds her life and the lives of those around her spiraling out of control in a deliciously chaotic series of events.
